The order of removal was discovered while reviewing a Petition for Alien Relative. https://t.co/hAEEWxHnzK

tweets.text: #FilingTipFriday: If you choose to mail your form, we want to ensure you avoid any delays & send us the correct version. tweets.text_resolved: #FilingTipFriday: If you choose to mail your form, we want to ensure you avoid any delays & send us the correct version. tweets.text: Did you know that if you are an alien in the United States, are 14 years old or more, were not registered and fingerprinted when you came to the U.S. and are staying 30 days or more in the U.S., you need to register. Learn more: https://t.co/q38WsZcXGI https://t.co/Jbtg1oaaZw
tweets.text_resolved: Did you know that if you are an alien in the United States, are 14 years old or more, were not registered and fingerprinted when you came to the U.S. and are staying 30 days or more in the U.S., you need to register. Learn more: http://uscis.gov/alienregistration https://t.co/Jbtg1oaaZw

tweets.text:
#ICYMI We helped @ICEgov & @NOPDNews apprehend 8 alien absconders at our New Orleans office who had:
✖️ final removal orders to leave the U.S.
✖️ warrants for assault, larceny & bank fraud
Under @Sec_Noem we are enforcing the law & keeping @POTUS’ promise to make America safe again!

tweets.text:
NEW: Under @POTUS and @Sec_Noem's leadership, USCIS has just rolled out a new update to its Systematic Alien Verification for Entitlements (SAVE) program to help eliminate voter fraud.  

The program provides a single, reliable source for verifying immigration status and U.S. citizenship. https://t.co/7Q7cV5Y7Yl
tweets.text_resolved:
NEW: Under @POTUS and @Sec_Noem's leadership, USCIS has just rolled out a new update to its Systematic Alien Verification for Entitlements (SAVE) program to help eliminate voter fraud.  

The program provides a single, reliable source for verifying immigration status and U.S. citizenship. https://dailycaller.com/2025/05/22/uscis-tool-to-prevent-non-citizen-voting/

tweets.text: In support of @POTUS’ executive order, Securing Our Borders, USCIS stopped accepting new cases in a variety of categorical parole programs established by the previous administration. We continue to make improvements to make America safe again. https://t.co/TBr2DnVpBU
tweets.text_resolved: In support of @POTUS’ executive order, Securing Our Borders, USCIS stopped accepting new cases in a variety of categorical parole programs established by the previous administration. We continue to make improvements to make America safe again. https://t.co/TBr2DnVpBU

tweets.text:
The Trump administration will no longer allow aliens to commit voter fraud in upcoming elections thanks to the USCIS Systematic Alien Verification for Entitlements (SAVE) program. The program provides a single, reliable source for verifying immigration status and U.S. citizenship.

Read more about it in @DailyCaller: https://t.co/7Q7cV5Y7Yl

Matthew Tragesser, chief of public affairs at USCIS

tweets.text: You run, we find you. A Cuban national wanted for criminal organized fraud thought he could slip through the cracks until he walked into our Hialeah office. We worked w/@MiamiDade_SO & Ellis County TX Sheriffs, who requested his extradition. He's behind bars & America is safer! https://t.co/kgAfPG3683
tweets.text_resolved: You run, we find you. A Cuban national wanted for criminal organized fraud thought he could slip through the cracks until he walked into our Hialeah office. We worked w/@MiamiDade_SO & Ellis County TX Sheriffs, who requested his extradition. He's behind bars & America is safer! https://t.co/kgAfPG3683

tweets.text: Illegal or unregistered aliens must register with the federal government within 30 days of entry into the U.S. or face criminal charges. This is one way USCIS and @DHSgov will make America safe again: https://t.co/dzPZXdkjvm
tweets.text_resolved: Illegal or unregistered aliens must register with the federal government within 30 days of entry into the U.S. or face criminal charges. This is one way USCIS and @DHSgov will make America safe again: http://dhs.gov/making-america-safe-again

tweets.text: We helped @ICEgov with the arrest of a Nigerian national at our Montgomery, Ala. office. He had an outstanding warrant for cruelty to a child and aggravated assault. Under the leadership of @POTUS and @Sec_Noem, this is how we make America safe again--one arrest at a time. https://t.co/DaJR1uHhp4
tweets.text_resolved: We helped @ICEgov with the arrest of a Nigerian national at our Montgomery, Ala. office. He had an outstanding warrant for cruelty to a child and aggravated assault. Under the leadership of @POTUS and @Sec_Noem, this is how we make America safe again--one arrest at a time. https://t.co/DaJR1uHhp4

tweets.text: By sharing data and utilizing advanced analytics, USCIS is strengthening its partnership with ICE in support of President Trump’s EO on immigration enforcement. This collaboration enhances national security and accelerates enforcement actions. https://t.co/B8hpXLf3ve

tweets.text: Our Columbus office identified an alien wanted on warrants, including identity fraud, larceny, forgery, and grand theft across Ohio. The criminal alien was apprehended by @ColumbusPolice. USCIS stands committed to the mission of making America safe again. https://t.co/kL7MM5ExSo
tweets.text_resolved: Our Columbus office identified an alien wanted on warrants, including identity fraud, larceny, forgery, and grand theft across Ohio. The criminal alien was apprehended by @ColumbusPolice. USCIS stands committed to the mission of making America safe again. https://t.co/kL7MM5ExSo

tweets.text: USCIS provided key support to @ICEgov, @CBP, @SATXPolice & @TxDPS in an investigation that led to the detainment of a Venezuelan national. The alien was arrested on suspicion of criminal activity related to a major operation that led to the rescue of 8 sex-trafficking victims. https://t.co/0gJkMnqGZb
tweets.text_resolved: USCIS provided key support to @ICEgov, @CBP, @SATXPolice & @TxDPS in an investigation that led to the detainment of a Venezuelan national. The alien was arrested on suspicion of criminal activity related to a major operation that led to the rescue of 8 sex-trafficking victims. https://t.co/0gJkMnqGZb

tweets.text: We worked closely with @ICEgov to apprehend an alien following an adjustment of status interview where they admitted under sworn statement that their marriage was for immigration fraud. We're committed to protecting the integrity of the immigration system & making America safe. https://t.co/SeDTihPwjT
tweets.text_resolved: We worked closely with @ICEgov to apprehend an alien following an adjustment of status interview where they admitted under sworn statement that their marriage was for immigration fraud. We're committed to protecting the integrity of the immigration system & making America safe. https://t.co/SeDTihPwjT

tweets.text:
Changing your address with the @USPS will not change your address with USCIS and USPS will not forward your mail from USCIS. Please update your information with both USCIS and USPS.
Submit your change of address today: https://t.co/gjWy0LyrCw https://t.co/DT5fCesxck
tweets.text_resolved:
Changing your address with the @USPS will not change your address with USCIS and USPS will not forward your mail from USCIS. Please update your information with both USCIS and USPS.
Submit your change of address today: https://www.uscis.gov/addresschange https://t.co/DT5fCesxck

tweets.text: We’re strengthening critical screening & vetting measures that lapsed under the prior Administration to keep American communities safe from dangerous criminal aliens. (2/2)
tweets.text_resolved: We’re strengthening critical screening & vetting measures that lapsed under the prior Administration to keep American communities safe from dangerous criminal aliens. (2/2)

tweets.text: USCIS is proud to be executing President Trump’s national security & public safety mandate by disrupting the flow of cartel members, terrorists & aliens with anti-American agendas from gaining a foothold in the U.S. (1/2)
tweets.text_resolved: USCIS is proud to be executing President Trump’s national security & public safety mandate by disrupting the flow of cartel members, terrorists & aliens with anti-American agendas from gaining a foothold in the U.S. (1/2)

tweets.text:
You MUST register under the Alien Registration Requirement if you: 
- Are 14 or older;
- Were not registered and fingerprinted when you applied for a U.S. visa; and
- Stay in the U.S, for 30 days or longer.
Register NOW: https://t.co/q38WsZcXGI https://t.co/xInGaDT3cc
tweets.text_resolved:
You MUST register under the Alien Registration Requirement if you: 
- Are 14 or older;
- Were not registered and fingerprinted when you applied for a U.S. visa; and
- Stay in the U.S, for 30 days or longer.
Register NOW: http://uscis.gov/alienregistration https://t.co/xInGaDT3cc

tweets.text:
All aliens in the U.S. must report a change of address to USCIS within 10 days of moving. This reporting requirement does not apply to A and G visa holders and visa waiver visitors. Failure to comply may result in fines or removal. 
Get started: https://t.co/gjWy0LyrCw https://t.co/EDbDE1PTR6
tweets.text_resolved:

Get started: https://www.uscis.gov/addresschange https://t.co/EDbDE1PTR6

tweets.text:
Another dangerous international fugitive caught: USCIS in Los Angeles worked with @FBI and @ICEgov to capture a criminal wanted in South Korea for smuggling methamphetamine. USCIS stands fast on its mission to make America safe again.  

Learn more: https://t.co/aXlx086RQM https://t.co/hX8x5E2Xrz

tweets.text: A Cuban national on the run in Ky. was apprehended by local law enforcement after a USCIS officer reviewing his green card application discovered arrest warrants in Fla. Every day USCIS officers help to make America safer by preventing fraud in our lawful immigration system. https://t.co/teejHAYLqW
tweets.text_resolved: A Cuban national on the run in Ky. was apprehended by local law enforcement after a USCIS officer reviewing his green card application discovered arrest warrants in Fla. Every day USCIS officers help to make America safer by preventing fraud in our lawful immigration system. https://t.co/teejHAYLqW

tweets.text: Lying is NOT worth the risk. This alien tried to hide his criminal past by lying, now he is convicted, sentenced & faces removal. USCIS provided valuable assistance & evidence in this case. We proudly support the mission to make America safe. Read more: https://t.co/MXpBPfQAxs https://t.co/U8NEiwlbEP
